description: The Sweet Spicy Jalapeno chip celebrates the vibrant culinary fusion of the last half-century.
Celebrating the vibrant energy of Diwali (Festival of Lights), these Sweet Spicy Jalapeno chips are a delightful fusion.

chip_name: Late July Mexican Street Corn Tortilla
description: Celebrated every year on September 16th across Mexico as a day to honor their national hero, the Late July Mexican Street Corn Tortilla chips transport you right into this vibrant fiesta.
event_name: Kitano Baika-sai or "Plum Blossom Festival" (Kitano Tenman-gu Shrine, Kyoto, Japan)
